# @codenhub/vite-plugin-icons

> Experimental Vite plugin that replaces static `ic-` marker elements with built-in or trusted custom inline SVG.

Use the sole package entrypoint. Pre transforms run in development and builds for HTML and JavaScript-family modules. Custom SVG is unsanitized; consumers own accessibility semantics and must preserve the Lucide NOTICE.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Scope, stability, requirements, and navigation.
- [Integration and API](docs/integration.md): Registration, plugin order, marker syntax, configuration, and every public export.
- [Generated SVG and constraints](docs/output-and-constraints.md): Output, security, accessibility, failures, and Lucide attribution.
